steps.title: Double the wall area
steps.content: Painting the walls twice means covering the total wall area twice. The total area painted is $2w$ square feet.

steps.title: Convert area to gallons
steps.content:
One gallon covers $70$ square feet, so divide the total painted area by $70$.
$$P=\frac{2w}{70}=\frac{w}{35}$$
The answer is D.
